reviews.review_title: Who doesn’t wanna fly and glide??
reviews.review_description: Agree w other player reminds me of Daeilus VR and to b honest the only thing that makes it even better then that beautiful game experience is there is mor of a challenge on this game so better for that meaning.if u like to glide/fly this game is a definitely must try and hope they add even mor levels it’s unique and very promising. Not mentioning how many times I died but let’s just say it was even fun doing that and thank u devs for putting checkpoints could’ve never beat it lol! Get it guys it’s 👍🏼

A game that strongly reminds me of Daedalus VR - a platform and exploration game with a unique atmosphere and mostly without any rush. I love Daedalus VR and I really like this game as well. It's fun, once you get the hang of the controls. The world and graphics fit well. There's no music, which I don't miss because it suits the game. However, it has a few weaknesses that hopefully will be addressed: In the menu, you can only click on Start; any other click causes the game to crash. There are only 10 levels in total, which is way too few, so you finish the game too quickly. Therefore, more levels are a must. It would also be nice to have some variety in the world you move in. But I would recommend it to fans of Daedalus VR.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice review! You will not be surprised to hear that we are also huge fans of Daedalus VR. In fact, it was a major source of inspiration for Photoelektric! Regarding the glitch you mentioned with the game menu - it has now been fixed. Regarding the length of the game, we are currently working on some extra levels that will be added in the near future. I will take your comment (that 10 levels being too short), as a sign that you wanted to keep playing once you finished the game?! Thanks again for the feedback.
